summary: Comprehensive testing of 6 bug fixes in F1 Intelligence app. All backend APIs (17/17) passed. Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly.
passed_tests: FilterBar - Driver dropdown search: typing 'hamilton' shows filtered results including 'HAM Lewis Hamilton'
FilterBar - Constructor dropdown search: typing 'ferrari' shows filtered results including 'Ferrari'
FilterBar - GO button exists and applies filters (URL updates with constructorId parameter)
Story Explorer - Seasons tab loads without errors
Story Explorer - Season 2023 profile loads with championship standings (Verstappen WDC, Red Bull WCC)
Story Explorer - Generate Facts works for constructor (Ferrari): returns career stats, milestones, driver records
Story Explorer - Generate Facts works for circuit (Silverstone): returns history, driver records, constructor records
Rivalry Explorer - Driver search dropdown allows typing full name without dropdown interrupting
Rivalry Explorer - Search for 'hamilton' shows filtered results including 'Lewis Hamilton'
Rivalry Explorer - Hamilton vs Verstappen comparison shows 208 common races with H2H statistics
Backend API - /api/facts/generate for constructor returns valid facts
Backend API - /api/facts/generate for circuit returns valid facts
Backend API - /api/season/{year}/profile returns valid season data with standings
Backend API - /api/drivers search endpoint filters correctly
Backend API - /api/constructors search endpoint filters correctly
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing F1 database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified working: 1) SearchableSelect component with Command for filter dropdowns, 2) GO button applies filters to charts, 3) Generate Facts extended for constructor and circuit entity types, 4) Seasons tab getEntityId/getEntityName null checks fix, 5) Rivalry DriverSelect with Popover-based searchable dropdown. The app supports searching ~860 drivers and ~210 constructors with proper filtering.
